SELECT toMillisecond(toDateTime64('2023-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3)) AS ms_min, toMillisecond(toDateTime64('2023-12-31 23:59:59.999', 3)) AS ms_max;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_time DateTime64(3), log_level String);
SELECT log_level, toMillisecond(log_time) FROM logs WHERE toMillisecond(log_time) > 100;
SELECT t1.log_level, toMillisecond(t1.log_time) FROM logs AS t1 JOIN timestamps AS t2 ON toMillisecond(t1.log_time) = toMillisecond(t2.event_time);
SELECT AVG(toMillisecond(event_time)) AS avg_ms FROM timestamps WHERE toMillisecond(event_time) > 200;
CREATE TABLE metrics AS SELECT toDateTime64('2023-05-01 12:00:00.500', 3) AS metric_time, toMillisecond(metric_time) AS ms_component;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM metrics WHERE ms_component < 900;
SELECT log_level, toMillisecond(log_time) FROM logs ORDER BY toMillisecond(log_time) DESC LIMIT 5;
